Rosalind Skillen
Rosalind Skillen
  • Home
  • Media
  • About
  • Contact

Media Appearances

A selection of TV, Radio, and Panel contributions.

RTÉ Radio 1

Radio essay with RTÉ Radio 1 on connecting with nature for Divine Sparks with Áine Lawlor.

Galway Bay FM

I spoke about my investigation into endometriosis services in Ireland, and why so many women are going abroad for surgery.

Inside the Irish Farmers Journal

I discussed my investigation into health misinformation online, in particular the harmful online trends in neonatal care.

Inside the Irish Farmers Journal

I spoke about the new Common Conditions Service that has been rolled out across Irish pharmacies, and the impact that the scheme is having in rural communities.

RTÉ 2FM

I spoke to RTÉ 2FM about my reporting on wedding trends for 2026

Beat 102 103

Spoke about Blue Monday and what we can do for our mental health in January

Tipp FM

I spoke to Tipp FM about my article on 'sharenting' and parents' growing concerns about posting their children online. In the article, I interviewed 'mumfluencers' on their views about posting their children on social media.

RTÉ 2FM

I spoke to RTÉ 2FM about the agricultural and environmental exhibits that piqued my interest at the Stripe Young Scientist & Technology Exhibition 2026 in Dublin.

Ireland AM

Contributed to Ireland AM discussion on why the Christmas dinner is getting more expensive. Includes tips on how consumers can save money this Christmas.

Dublin Freelance Forum

Contributed to a panel discussion on climate change reporting, alongside Irish journalists Caroline O’Doherty, Elaine Walsh and Priyanka Borpujari

Bridging The Atlantic

Spoke on a panel [from 02:53:52] as part of conference organised by Queens' University Belfast, Georgetown University, and University College Dublin's Clinton Institute.

Green Foundation Ireland

Delivered a keynote at the 'Greening the Narrative' conference, alongside other journalists and editors, in Dublin's Mansion House.

Keynote at Green Foundation Ireland conference

I closed the conference talking about how communication, creativity and storytelling can help address the climate crisis.

Belfast Telegraph

Do we need to dump comforts and capitalism to solve the climate crisis? I spoke to Belfast Telegraph about why climate change is not a deal breaker at the ballot box.

Tedx Talks

I delivered a TEDx talk in Stormont Parliament Buildings in advance of COP26.

BBC Radio Ulster

Invited onto Lynette Fay show to talk about COP26.
